title: Multi-LLM Dev Workflow
summary: Three-provider AI workflow routing tasks by model strength: Claude Code as orchestrator, Codex as async adversarial reviewer, Gemini for large-context analysis.
imageAlt: Dual-monitor developer workstation with VS Code open showing code on both screens
description: Architected a three-provider AI development workflow routing tasks by model strength and context window.

paragraphs.label: Stack
paragraphs.text: Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, Gemini 2.5 Pro, Ollama, Open WebUI, Mac Mini 24GB

paragraphs.label: Design
paragraphs.text: Claude Code as orchestrator (planning/writing), Codex as async adversarial reviewer, Gemini for large-context full-repo analysis.

paragraphs.label: Context
paragraphs.text: Documented with real failure cases at levihuff.net.

title: Proxmox Homelab & Docker Stack
summary: Migrated self-hosted services from individual LXCs to a unified Docker stack; configured subnet static routing to isolate household services from upstream failures.
imageAlt: Rack of server units installed in a data center server room
description: Self-hosted infrastructure stack running on Proxmox with Docker Compose and network-level DNS filtering.

paragraphs.label: Stack
paragraphs.text: Proxmox, Docker, Pi-hole, Uptime Kuma, Jellyfin, Bookstack, Home Assistant

paragraphs.label: Impact
paragraphs.text: Migrated from individual LXCs to a unified Docker stack; subnet static routing isolates household service availability from upstream failures.

title: Windows Imaging and PXE Automation
summary: Built a PXE boot and automated imaging pipeline at two co-op employers. Cut Windows 11 deployment from two hours to under 20 minutes per machine.
imageAlt: Hands installing a CPU processor chip onto a motherboard socket
description: Automated imaging pipeline built across two co-op employers using FOG Project and MDT. Eliminated manual installs and standardized Windows 11 deployments across departments.

paragraphs.label: Stack
paragraphs.text: FOG Project, MDT, Windows Deployment Services, UEFI/BIOS config

paragraphs.label: Impact
paragraphs.text: Reduced per-machine deployment time from roughly 2 hours to under 20 minutes. Automated Lenovo driver injection, domain enrollment, and department-specific image variants.

paragraphs.label: Context
paragraphs.text: Deployed at Tire Discounters (MDT image) and Total Quality Logistics (PXE pipeline with pre-imaging checklist for I/O verification and BIOS configuration).

meta: Professional co-op project. Tire Discounters and Total Quality Logistics, 2022.

title: AeroAssist

paragraphs.label: Key Features

title: LocoQuest

title: Culinary Mastery
summary: Cooking-education platform with Azure-backed auth and AI-driven explanations. UC Senior Design Group 7, IT Expo 2025.
imageAlt: Culinary Mastery educational platform showing video tutorial interface
description: Web-based cooking education platform delivering step-by-step video lessons with a secure Azure backend and backend AI integration.

paragraphs.label: Technologies

paragraphs.label: Key Features
paragraphs.text: YouTube video integration, Azure Cosmos DB for user and course data, Firebase + Azure Authentication with 2FA, backend Azure AI for explanations and translations

title: UCRelief
imageAlt: Diverse group of university students gathered around a laptop collaborating together
description: Concept design project showcasing app design skills without code. UCRelief assists University of Cincinnati students with current challenges by providing up-to-date information.

paragraphs.label: Context
paragraphs.text: College advice rapidly becomes outdated. In 2000, student loans averaged $26,160, now it's $36,900. UCRelief addresses this gap for UC students.

paragraphs.label: Role
paragraphs.text: Designer (Concept Pitch)

paragraphs.label: Timeline
paragraphs.text: January 2021 - April 2021

title: Computer Imaging and Provisioning Automation
imageAlt: Computer lab classroom with multiple desks and workstations set up for deployment
description: Professional project focused on automating computer imaging and provisioning processes to improve efficiency and accuracy.

paragraphs.label: Impact
paragraphs.text: Reduced manual configuration time, ensured consistent deployments, improved device readiness for end-users

paragraphs.label: Technologies
paragraphs.text: Automation tools, imaging software, device management systems

title: IT Support and Process Improvement
imageAlt: IT support professional wearing headphones at desk with laptop computer
description: Professional IT support work involving clearing a backlogged ticket queue, supporting multiple locations, and improving the employee onboarding process.

paragraphs.label: Impact
paragraphs.text: Restored a reliable support process, reduced onboarding ambiguity through process documentation, and handled on-site and remote requests across Cincinnati and Sharonville.

paragraphs.label: Approach
paragraphs.text: Triaged tickets by priority, documented onboarding workflows and system handoffs, and resolved issues on-site or over the phone depending on what each situation required.

title: Machine Lifecycle and Decommissioning
imageAlt: Close-up macro shot of a computer circuit board showing chips and components
description: Hands-on professional work managing hardware retirement based on processor generation standards.

paragraphs.label: Impact
paragraphs.text: Kept the hardware fleet current by identifying and staging machines for destruction once they no longer met OS or software requirements.

paragraphs.label: Approach
paragraphs.text: Identified machines by processor generation, tracked assets through the decommissioning pipeline, and staged them for destruction by the appropriate team.

meta: Professional work at Total Quality Logistics

title: End-User Equipment Moves
imageAlt: Modern clean desk workspace with keyboard, monitor, and office equipment
description: Day-to-day IT support work centered around helping employees move and get set up in new spaces.

paragraphs.label: Impact
paragraphs.text: Reduced frustration and downtime by making sure users were fully set up and ready to work as quickly as possible.

paragraphs.label: Approach
paragraphs.text: Communicated directly with users, carefully broke down and moved equipment, then rebuilt and tested everything at the new location.

meta: Professional work at Total Quality Logistics
